html:
Exclusive to:

Feijoada (pronounced /fejʒuˈadɐ/ or "feyzhu-A-da") is a Meat Food Item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is cooked in the Crock Pot by using 3 Bean Bugs and a Meat item. Feijoada does not require Meat if at least one of the Bean Bugs has been cooked.

Feijoada takes 70 seconds to cook and restores 20 Health, 75 Hunger and 15 Sanity when eaten.

Prerequisites

  • Requires: 
  • Requires:

Recipe

×3

Examples

×3

×3

Trivia

  • During the Pig Fiesta event, Feijoada takes on a more festive appearance.
  • The Feijoada is a common dish from Brazil, Angola, Mozambique, Macau and Portugal, almost always accompanied with rice.

'''Feijoada''' (pronounced /fejʒuˈadɐ/ or "feyzhu-A-da") is a [[Meat]] [[Food]] [[Item]] exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. It is cooked in the [[Crock Pot]] by using 3 [[Bean Bugs]] and a [[Meats|Meat]] item. Feijoada does not require Meat if at least one of the Bean Bugs has been cooked.

Feijoada takes 70 seconds to cook and restores 20 [[Health]], 75 [[Hunger]] and 15 [[Sanity]] when eaten.

== Prerequisites ==
* Requires: [[File:Bean Bugs.png|link=Bean Bugs]][[File:Cooked Bean Bugs.png|link=Bean Bugs]]
* Requires: [[File:Meats_Crock_Pot.png|link=Meats]]

== {{pic|32|Cookbook}} Recipe ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Bean Bugs
|count1 = 3
|item2 = Meats
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Feijoada
}}

== Examples ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Bean Bugs
|count1 = 3
|item2 = Meat
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Feijoada
}}
{{Recipe
|item1 = Cooked Bean Bugs
|count1 = 3
|item2 = Morsel
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Feijoada
|note = 
}}

== {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* During the [[Pig Fiesta]] event, Feijoada takes on a more festive appearance.
* The [[wikipedia:Feijoada|Feijoada]] is a common dish from Brazil, Angola, Mozambique, Macau and Portugal, almost always accompanied with rice.
